name: hud_ui_element_update
description: HudUiElement::Update dispatches draw/base-draw work from flags and hides timed elements when their timer expires.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x4b41e0, so Binary-safe remains false.

Binary Ninja retains a limited reconstruction marker because flag checks render through low-byte/not.d artifacts and the timer countdown path exposes a partial x87 fstp flag-state limitation at 0x4b4234.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly for 0x4b41e0 validates visible draw dispatch through ftable slot 1, dirty flag 0x04 and alternate dirty flag 0x08 clearing after draw, hidden dirty/base-draw dispatch through ftable slot 2, timer decrement by deltaTime, and SetVisible(0) through ftable slot 0x60 when the timer reaches zero.
The native smoke verifies visible draw, visible dirty 0x04 and 0x08 paths, hidden dirty 0x04 and 0x08 base-draw paths, active timer countdown, and expired timer hide behavior.
